content.en:
"It is worthy of being the Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu, with so many Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu, I am now instructing the Endless Yuan Dao with an efficiency that is countless times higher than in the past!"

Ye Tian could clearly feel the progress of the Endless Yuan Dao now, and in the past few years of comprehending the Millions of Origin Realms, it seemed that there was no progress in the slightest.

That's the difference!

"The gold liquid in the body of those Yuan Shen Golden Drums can be used to comprehend the Endless Yuan Dao, and the effect should be better!"

Thereupon.

Ye Tian took out some gold liquid and tried to refine it to see the effect.

A drop of molten gold enters the mouth and begins to refine.

In the process of refining the golden liquid, Ye Tian clearly felt that his efficiency in comprehending the Endless Yuan Dao had improved again.

"Yes, at least it can increase the efficiency several times, I have comprehended the Endless Yuan Dao is already incredible, and it can also increase the efficiency several times, this should be the effect of completely using the golden liquid!"

Ye Tian took out drop after drop of gold liquid, and the Endless Yuan Dao continued to improve.

Other Dao Ancestors may still have bottlenecks in the Yuan Dao, and they can't make progress for countless years, but Ye Tian has no bottleneck at all, and he has been making progress all the time.

If the process of entering the Yuan Dao to the Xiaocheng realm is divided into the early stage, middle stage, late stage and peak realm.

Now, Ye Tian is at the peak realm of the middle stage of entry, and he is about to reach the realm of the late stage of entry, don't underestimate this small step, for the Dao Ancestors, it is a huge progress!

Just when Ye Tian's gold liquid was about to be exhausted, Ye Tian's Endless Yuan Dao finally ushered in a small breakthrough.

"The Endless Yuan Dao has stepped into the late stage of the entry realm, if it is promoted to the peak level of the entry level, it will not be far from the Endless Yuan Dao of the small Cheng level!"

And now that Yuan Dao has progressed, Ye Tian's strength has naturally improved a lot.

"I have to create a top-notch Yuan Dao control technique!"

Ye Tian has never created a top-notch Yuan Dao control technique, although his five control skills are very good, very close to the top Yuan Dao control technique, but after all, it is still a little close.

If he creates a top-notch Yuan Dao control technique, his strength will have to be improved.

"The top Yuan Dao control technique, you have to create it from your own natal Yuan Dao control skill, first create the top Yuan Dao control technique of the attack class, I have a strong ability to save my life, and I don't need the top Yuan Dao control skill of the defense class at present, and don't rush to create. "

Next, Ye Tian used the Endless Golden Light as a derivative basis to create a top-notch Yuan Dao control technique.

His Endless Yuan Dao had already reached the late stage of entry, and he had a large number of Yuan Dao Ancestral Endowments, so it was very easy for him to create a top-notch Yuan Dao control technique, and it wouldn't be long before he could.

After only millions of years of the Origin Domain Era, Ye Tian had successfully created a top-notch Yuan Dao control technique.

Beyond the primeval era, above the silent Black Sea.

A copy of Ye Tian's body came here to test the power of this new top-notch Yuan Dao control technique.

Soon.

A primordial artifact appeared.

At this time, a touch of golden light appeared in Ye Tian's hand, and the golden light turned into a spear.

Ye Tian held a spear in his hand and killed the primordial artifact in one blow!

As time passed, more and more primordial antiquities emerged, all of which were killed by Ye Tian with this spear.

In the end, a primordial ancient person comparable to the half-step sevenfold ancestor level appeared.

And Ye Tian still relied on this spear to kill him with one blow, even this immortal Yuan Dao Ancestor of the Primordial Ancients couldn't bear it.

"The Endless Golden Spear made by the condensation and compression of the Endless Golden Light is really much more powerful than the Endless Golden Light, and this kind of attack has surpassed the power of the ordinary top-notch Yuan Dao control technique, I am afraid that it is very close to the small consummation-level Yuan Dao control technique!"

Ye Tian was very satisfied with such a top-notch Yuan Dao control technique, and the Endless Golden Spear was also Ye Tian's first top-notch Yuan Dao control technique, and it originated from the Endless Golden Light, and there was still hope that it would be deduced to the top Yuan Dao control technique of the Small Perfection level in the future.

The division between the Yuan Dao Control Technique and the Natal Extreme Dao Control Technique is similar, and they are all divided into ordinary Yuan Dao Control Skills, top Yuan Dao Control Skills, Small Perfection Yuan Dao Control Techniques, Great Perfection Yuan Dao Control Techniques, and Supreme Yuan Dao Control Techniques.

And if you want to comprehend the Xiaocheng Yuan Dao control technique, you can't do it without comprehending the Yuan Dao of the Xiaocheng realm!

Therefore, even if Ye Tian spent more time now, it would be impossible for him to create the Little Perfection Yuan Dao Control Technique.

However, the top-notch Yuan Dao control technique was enough.

In the following years, Ye Tian developed a top-notch Yuan Dao control technique from the Infinite Extreme Speed, which is a natal Yuan Dao control technique, Yuan Dun Extreme Speed.

Yuan Dun's extreme speed made Ye Tian's speed skyrocket, far exceeding the previous speed.

Then, Ye Tian derived from the Endless Primordial Body and created a top-notch Yuan Dao Control Technique, the Ten Thousand Dao Ancestral Body!

Subsequently, he derived from the Infinite Black Domain, a natal Yuan Dao control technique, to create a top-notch Yuan Dao control technique, the Nine Black Domains!

In the end, Ye Tian derived from the Endless Light Mask to create a top-notch Yuan Dao control technique for defense-Colorless Light Mask!

The creation of the colorless light mask was an accident, this defensive Yuan Dao control technique is very powerful, and once it is cast, it will form a colorless cover.

And the hood was big, big, and thick, like a field.

The enemy's attack hit the colorless light mask, which was difficult to penetrate, so it could not threaten Ye Tian's body, and it could not even form a concussive impact.

Other than that.

With the colorless light mask and the Nine Black Domains, as well as special effects, weaker enemies will be directly crushed by Ye Tian and turned into nothingness.

With the creation of these five top-notch Yuan Dao control techniques, Ye Tian's strength has once again improved.

When Ye Tian was cultivating, there was another big thing about to happen in the Hanhai District Realm.

Hanhai Palace.

At this time, a big figure appeared in Hanhai Palace, the palace master of the previous Hanhai Palace, and now the eightfold original ancestor - the Holy Ape Dao Ancestor!

"I've seen the Holy Ape Dao Ancestor!"

"I've seen the Holy Ape Dao Ancestor!"

"I've seen the Holy Ape Dao Ancestor!"

Several half-step eightfold ancestors were extremely respectful, although in the years that the Holy Ape Dao Ancestor had been away for too long, there were one or two half-step eightfold ancestors who had not even seen the Holy Ape Dao Ancestor, but they were still extremely respectful to him.

At this time, they were very curious, what did the Holy Ape Dao Ancestor, who was the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, come back to do?

After all, the Holy Ape Dao Ancestor had already reached the Eightfold Origin Ancestor realm, while the Hanhai Region Boundary was only a weak large region boundary, and the resources and environment here were not good, so it was not suitable for the Eightfold Origin Ancestor to cultivate.

"The Primordial Antiquity-Holy Dao Monument will appear in the Hanhai Region Boundary this time, so I am back, this is a very important big event, and when the time comes, there will be many Dao Ancestors from other Regions Realm, if one is not handled well, a great war that spreads throughout the Region will break out!"

The Holy Ape Dao Ancestor revealed.

As soon as they heard the Primordial Antiquities Sacred Dao Monument, these half-step eightfold ancestors were shocked.
